response.justification: Bogdan has strong full-stack engineering experience, open-source contributions, and exposure to agentic workflows and real-time systems, but lacks clear evidence of leading multi-agent AI systems at scale in regulated fintech environments, managing teams beyond 10 people, or designing financial AI infrastructure with compliance and auditability — key requirements for a CTO role.
strengths: Hands-on experience with agentic workflows and MCP frameworks at re:cinq
Proven track record in distributed systems, event-driven architecture, and real-time data handling
Strong engineering culture advocacy through testing, CI/CD, and knowledge sharing initiatives
concerns: No demonstrable leadership of engineering teams larger than 10, or experience building senior technical leadership layers
Lacks explicit experience in fintech infrastructure, credit risk systems, or regulatory compliance for AI decisioning
No evidence of designing model-agnostic, auditable multi-agent architectures with feedback loops for financial outcomes
